approvedBy: Steve continuous-builder priority + Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve prioritized the safe extractor queue after foundation:verify/build-lane reliability, Build Intel watchlist, and course source-auth boundary shipped, with explicit instruction to avoid live extraction, private auth, paid access, external writes, Drive mutation, Gmail/ClickUp sends, Agent Feedback auto-send, and hidden subagents unless separately approved.
scopeSummary: Prepare metadata-only public YouTube Build Intel last-20 queue specs from existing source truth, classify evidence needs and budgets, keep all extraction/model/output side effects blocked, and prove unsafe variants fail closed.
notApproved: Do not search YouTube or the public web.
Do not fetch transcripts, capture screenshots/keyframes, download videos, summarize content, run vision, or call a model.
Do not use paid/private/community/course auth, Skool, MyICOR, Loom, or authorized-browser sessions.
Do not write Research Inbox rows, KB drafts, atoms, action routes, or backlog content from extracted material.
Do not mutate Drive, Gmail, ClickUp, Slack, Agent Feedback, or external systems.
Do not launch hidden subagents or parallel builders.
